name: Saus Kacang
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind together pepper, onion, garlic, and shrimp paste.
2. Fry the mixture together in a little vegetable oil until the onion is golden.
3. Add the pan drippings to the fried mixture.
4. Incorporate the peanut butter, salt, and tamarind water.
5. Stir and cook until the sauce reaches the consistency of thick gravy.
